title: workspaces — queued jobs
description: Queued jobs this module dispatches. Every job runs on the `default` queue unless noted. Retries follow exponential backoff. ShouldBeUnique jobs enforce single-inflight per key. Payloads are hydrated from DTO serialisation; models are re-fetched from the DB on handle to avoid stale-state issues.

jobs.description: Diff every DomainRecord row for a Domain against real DNS. Update `status`, `last_seen_value`, `last_check_at`. If every record matches → set Domain.verified_at + dispatch DomainVerified. If exhausted → dispatch DomainVerificationFailed.

Async provisioning tail. The synchronous transaction in RegisterWorkspaceController creates the Workspace + owner + default sub-rows and fires WorkspaceProvisioning. This job handles the outbound side (welcome email, index build, DNS record write for the auto-subdomain).
Hard-deletes an archived Workspace AFTER the retention window (30d). Cascades through every workspace_id FK. Emits an audit trail entry pre-delete. Refuses if `is_system=true`.
Re-denormalises `workspaces.branding` JSONB from the primary Branding row. Called by BrandingObserver on save and by the workspaces:seed-defaults command.

Runs the provider-specific sync (SCIM pull, HRIS delta, SAML metadata refresh). Reads the WorkspaceIntegration config via the IntegrationConfig cast (decrypts). Sets `last_sync_at`, `last_sync_status`, `next_sync_at`, `sync_cursor`.

dns.description: DNS lookups. Isolated because backoff windows are long (up to 12h) — do not want them starving other work.

retention.description: Slow, low-priority. Runs under the scheduled retention window.

integrations.description: External provider sync. Higher timeout; isolated to protect the main queue from provider slowness.
